utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all six: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is specified; travel_dates (October 15–19, 2024) are specified; transportation includes flight details with cost (120 EUR) and full details; accommodation includes hotel with costs and details; activities are clearly specified with type, duration, and cost; additional_services include dining with costs; and total_budget provides a complete breakdown. Each is fully specified with all required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes four main components: (1) the destination Lisbon, Portugal; (2) a Budget Airline flight in Economy class; (3) accommodation at 'Boutique Stay'; and (4) an activity named 'Guided Walking & Wellness Tour', which most closely aligns with the 'City Walking Tour' and 'Yoga Retreat' in the ground-truth activities (the title suggests a combination of walking and wellness). However, only exact matches should be rated, so the closest identifiable activity is 'City Walking Tour' since it references a guided walking experience. For dining, the package mentions 'Local Bistro', which corresponds most closely to 'French Café' or 'Italian Trattoria' in the restaurant list. Given 'Local Bistro' is not explicitly listed, the closest match by type and cost is 'French Café'. The ratings from the ground-truth data are: Lisbon, Portugal (7); Budget Airline Economy Class (10); Boutique Stay (7); City Walking Tour (9); French Café (7).
